entities.name: WhatsApp Marketing Platform
entities.summary: Enterprise-grade high-volume business messaging automation engine.
entities.description: Unified direct-to-customer messaging platform integrated with the official WhatsApp Business API, supporting broadcasts, CRM segments, and multi-agent shared inboxes.

overview.summary: Enterprise-grade high-volume business messaging automation engine.
overview.description: Unified direct-to-customer messaging platform integrated with the official WhatsApp Business API, supporting broadcasts, CRM segments, and multi-agent shared inboxes.

how_it_works.process: Connects directly via the official WhatsApp Business API to run high-volume broadcasts with built-in compliance controls.
steps: Mass broadcasting with smart rate limit controls
Two-way agent desk shared inbox routing

features: Official WhatsApp Business API verified sender integration
Mass broadcasting campaigns with opt-in and DND compliance controls
Unified shared inbox for multi-agent collaborative desks
Cohort segmentation targeting based on CRM behavior rules
benefits: Achieve up to 98% message open rates
Reduce lead acquisition/support response latency by 75%

faq.question: Is it compliant with WhatsApp policies?
faq.answer: Yes, it enforces strict opt-in/opt-out rules and rate limits to keep your sender number healthy.

entities.name: Influencer Marketing Platform
entities.summary: Automated campaign execution and creator relationship platform.
entities.description: Workspace for planning creator collaborations, managing payouts, verifying creator demographic audience metrics, and tracking campaign sales lift ROI.

overview.summary: Automated campaign execution and creator relationship platform.
overview.description: Workspace for planning creator collaborations, managing payouts, verifying creator demographic audience metrics, and tracking campaign sales lift ROI.

how_it_works.process: Streamlines creator discovery, contract automation, payout tracking, and cross-platform campaign analytics.
steps: Search and verify creators in demographic database
Generate contract and payout terms automatically
Launch campaigns and track UTM/sales conversions

features: Creator demographic analytics and verification database filters
Automated payout cycles, TDS tax processing, and legally binding contract loops
Real-time ROI dashboard mapping metrics across TikTok, Instagram, and YouTube
benefits: Cut creator discovery overhead by up to 60%
Establish measurable ROI for UGC brand awareness campaigns

faq.question: Which social platforms are supported?
faq.answer: TikTok, Instagram, and YouTube are fully integrated for real-time tracking.
